title: Mace's Origins
description: welcome to mace's origins! this is a passion project that is split from origins and just my version of origins! i hope you like it!
body:
Welcome to my own custom origins mod, **Mace's Origins!**

Also, this mod greatly improves the fun of minecraft by giving you cool powers and other various things, look below for more information about the mod.

This took me a month to create, if you download this, **THANK YOU SO MUCH!** it reallys helps my mod get out there!

- All the features from origins
- Size features to change it in selection screen
- Debuffs and Buffs depending on what origin you choose
- 85 Origins are in this mod(depending on what version you get)
- compatible with many other mods such as sodium and more!
- Click the O key after getting your origin to view it!
- Click the G key to use your first ability!
- Click the H key for your second ability(if your origin has one)!
- 1.21.11 port is coming new with new ui, and changed origins and new ones!

I really hope that you download this, as this is my first ever mod, and have never worked on on before!

Im doing massive work on this mod now, adding new mod loader ports such as neoforge, forge, and quilt.

I hope you like it!
MaceMeta!
